name: Dext (formerly Receipt Bank)
tagline: AI-powered receipt capture and bookkeeping data extraction
description: Dext uses AI and OCR to automatically extract data from receipts, invoices, and bank statements. It captures line-item details, matches transactions, and pushes clean data into QuickBooks, Xero, or Sage. Popular with accounting firms managing multiple clients, Dext eliminates manual data entry for expense management.
cons: Can be pricey for single users
